inline_comments.message:
This new model, AUTOMATION COMPOSITION, is missing some direct definitions, for example:
- tosca.capabilities.Node
- tosca.relationships.DependsOn
- tosca.interfaces.node.lifecycle.Standard
- ...

and the definitions dependencies:
- tosca.capabilities.Root
- tosca.relationships.Root
- tosca.interfaces.relationship.Configure
- tosca.interfaces.Root
- ...

And so on... Same can apply for other types, like data types, policy types, etc. I haven't gone through all the files.

The missing type definitions can have a direct impact on SDC functionalities and cause unpredictable/awkward bugs.

In my opinion, it would be good to address the issue in this ticket. If not, we could handle that in a separate bug ticket.
